subagents.finding: The 26 missing rows are Socrata cachedContents.top category-frequency rows and should be represented as counts of dataset rows, not borough, route, direction, hour, or day units.

change.normalizer: Added an exact 26-name Socrata data-dictionary row-count set gated on finite nonnegative integer value and raw_value_text containing the stored count.
guardrails: No broad _count or category-count pattern was added.
Same-shaped names outside the exact set remain unresolved.
Rows with decimal values or raw/value mismatches remain unresolved.
days_count_7 and hours_count_24 are treated as dataset-row counts, not duration units.

next_candidate_lanes: generic ridership and vacancy rows, if evidence gates can distinguish counts from rates/percentages
crash_injuries and traffic_fatalities_and_injuries safety rows, if raw/evidence proves injury-count semantics
change/score/rating rows, likely requiring a stricter policy rather than direct unit inference
traffic-volume and toll traffic rows, if source context proves vehicle-crossing/traffic units
